158 D0600_STF_MOOD_SCRE_NUM D0600_STF_MOOD_SCRE_NUM D0600 Staff Assessment Total Severity Mood Score CHAR 2 The data in this column contains the total severity score of mood symptoms from the staff assessment. 0 Minimum Value
